\"inherit\";\n    39→  }\n    40→  return \"inherit\";\n    41→}\n    42→\n    43→function getOrgAutoOptIn(orgId: number | null, teamsAutoOptIn: Record<number, boolean>): boolean {\n    44→  if (orgId !== null) {\n    45→    return teamsAutoOptIn[orgId] ?? false;\n    46→  }\n    47→  return false;\n    48→}\n    49→\n    50→function getTeamIdsToQuery(teamId: number, parentOrgId: number | null | undefined): number[] {\n    51→  if (parentOrgId) {\n    52→    return [teamId, parentOrgId];\n    53→  }\n    54→  return [teamId];\n    55→}\n    56→\n    57→function getOrgStateForTeam(\n    58→  parentOrgId: number | null | undefined,\n    59→  teamStates: Record<string, Record<number, FeatureState>>,\n    60→  slug: FeatureId\n    61→): FeatureState {\n    62→  if (parentOrgId) {\n    63→    return teamStates[slug]?.[parentOrgId] ?? \"inherit\";\n    64→  }\n    65→  return \"inherit\";\n    66→}\n    67→\n    68→/**\n    69→ * Service class for managing feature opt-in logic.\n    70→ * Computes effective states based on global, org, team, and user settings.\n    71→ */\n    72→export class FeatureOptInService implements IFeatureOptInService {\n    73→  constructor(private featuresRepository: FeaturesRepository) {}\n    74→\n    75→  /**\n    76→   * Core method: Resolve feature states for a user across all their teams.\n    77→   *\n    78→   * Precedence rules:\n    79→   * 1. Global disabled → false (stop)\n    80→   * 2. Org explicitly disabled → false (stop)\n    81→   * 3. Org explicitly enabled → allowed at org level, continue to teams\n    82→   * 4. Org inherits (or no org) → check teams\n    83→   * 5. All teams explicitly disabled → false (stop)\n    84→   * 6. At least one team enabled OR inherits → allowed at team level, continue to user\n    85→   * 7. User explicitly disabled → false\n    86→   * 8. User explicitly enabled OR inherits → true\n    87→   *\n    88→   * Auto-opt-in transformation:\n    89→   * - If autoOptInFeatures=true at a level AND state is \"inherit\", transform to \"enabled\"\n    90→   * - This transformation happens before computing effectiveEnabled\n    91→   */\n    92→  async resolveFeatureStatesAcrossTeams({\n    93→    userId,\n    94→    orgId,\n    95→    teamIds,\n    96→    featureIds,\n    97→  }: {\n    98→    userId: number;\n    99→    orgId: number | null;\n   100→    teamIds: number[];\n   101→    featureIds: FeatureId[];\n   102→  }): Promise<Record<string, ResolvedFeatureState>> {\n   103→    const allTeamIds = orgId !== null ? [orgId, ...teamIds] : teamIds;\n   104→\n   105→    const [allFeatures, allTeamStates, userStates, userAutoOptIn, teamsAutoOptIn] = await Promise.all([\n   106→      this.featuresRepository.getAllFeatures(),\n   107→      this.featuresRepository.getTeamsFeatureStates({ teamIds: allTeamIds, featureIds }),\n   108→      this.featuresRepository.getUserFeatureStates({ userId, featureIds }),\n   109→      this.featuresRepository.getUserAutoOptIn(userId),\n   110→      this.featuresRepository.getTeamsAutoOptIn(allTeamIds),\n   111→    ]);\n   112→\n   113→    const globalEnabledMap = new Map(allFeatures.map((feature) => [feature.slug, feature.enabled ?? false]));\n   114→    const resolvedStates: Record<string, ResolvedFeatureState> = {};\n   115→\n   116→    for (const featureId of featureIds) {\n   117→      const state = this.resolveFeatureState(\n   118→        featureId,\n   119→        orgId,\n   120→        teamIds,\n   121→        globalEnabledMap,\n   122→        allTeamStates,\n   123→        userStates,\n   124→        teamsAutoOptIn,\n   125→        userAutoOptIn\n   126→      );\n   127→      resolvedStates[featureId] = state;\n   128→    }\n   129→\n   130→    return resolvedStates;\n   131→  }\n   132→\n   133→  private resolveFeatureState(\n   134→    featureId: FeatureId,\n   135→    orgId: number | null,\n   136→    teamIds: number[],\n   137→    globalEnabledMap: Map<string, boolean>,\n   138→    allTeamStates: Record<string, Record<number, FeatureState>>,\n   139→    userStates: Record<string, FeatureState>,\n   140→    teamsAutoOptIn: Record<number, boolean>,\n   141→    userAutoOptIn: boolean\n   142→  ): ResolvedFeatureState {\n   143→    const globalEnabled = globalEnabledMap.get(featureId) ?? false;\n   144→    const teamStatesById = allTeamStates[featureId] ?? {};\n   145→\n   146→    const orgState = getOrgState(orgId, teamStatesById);\n   147→    const teamStates = teamIds.map((teamId) => teamStatesById[teamId] ?? \"inherit\");\n   148→    const userState = userStates[featureId] ?? \"inherit\";\n   149→    const orgAutoOptIn = getOrgAutoOptIn(orgId, teamsAutoOptIn);\n   150→    const teamAutoOptIns = teamIds.map((teamId) => teamsAutoOptIn[teamId] ?? false);\n   151→\n   152→    const { effectiveOrgState, effectiveTeamStates, effectiveUserState } = applyAutoOptIn({\n   153→      orgState,\n   154→      teamStates,\n   155→      userState,\n   156→      orgAutoOptIn,\n   157→      teamAutoOptIns,\n   158→      userAutoOptIn,\n   159→    });\n   160→\n   161→    const policy: OptInFeaturePolicy = \"permissive\";\n   162→\n   163→    const { enabled: effectiveEnabled, reason: effectiveReason } = computeEffectiveStateAcrossTeams({\n   164→      globalEnabled,\n   165→      orgState: effectiveOrgState,\n   166→      teamStates: effectiveTeamStates,\n   167→      userState: effectiveUserState,\n   168→      policy,\n   169→    });\n   170→\n   171→    return {\n   172→      featureId,\n   173→      globalEnabled,\n   174→      orgState,\n   175→      teamStates,\n   176→      userState,\n   177→      effectiveEnabled,\n   178→      effectiveReason,\n   179→      orgAutoOptIn,\n   180→      teamAutoOptIns,\n   181→      userAutoOptIn,\n   182→    };\n   183→  }\n   184→\n   185→  /**\n   186→   * List all opt-in features with their states for a user across teams.\n   187→   * Only returns features that are in the allowlist, globally enabled, and scoped to \"user\".\n   188→   */\n   189→  async listFeaturesForUser(input: {\n   190→    userId: number;\n   191→    orgId: number | null;\n   192→    teamIds: number[];\n   193→  }): Promise<ListFeaturesForUserResult[]> {\n   194→    const { userId, orgId, teamIds } = input;\n   195→    const userScopedFeatures = getOptInFeaturesForScope(\"user\");\n   196→    const featureIds = userScopedFeatures.map((config) => config.slug);\n   197→\n   198→    const resolvedStates = await this.resolveFeatureStatesAcrossTeams({\n   199→      userId,\n   200→      orgId,\n   201→      teamIds,\n   202→      featureIds,\n   203→    });\n   204→\n   205→    return featureIds.map((featureId) => resolvedStates[featureId]).filter((state) => !state.globalEnabled);\n   206→  }\n   207→\n   208→  /**\n   209→   * List all opt-in features with their raw states for a team or organization.\n   210→   * Used for team/org admin settings page to configure feature opt-in.\n   211→   * Only returns features that are in the allowlist, globally enabled, and scoped to the specified scope.\n   212→   * If parentOrgId is provided, also returns the organization state for each feature.\n   213→   */\n   214→  async listFeaturesForTeam(input: {\n   215→    teamId: number;\n   216→    parentOrgId?: number | null;\n   217→    scope?: OptInFeatureScope;\n   218→  }): Promise<ListFeaturesForTeamResult[]> {\n   219→    const { teamId, parentOrgId, scope = \"team\" } = input;\n   220→    const teamIdsToQuery = getTeamIdsToQuery(teamId, parentOrgId);\n   221→    const scopedFeatures = getOptInFeaturesForScope(scope);\n   222→\n   223→    const [allFeatures, teamStates] = await Promise.all([\n   224→      this.featuresRepository.getAllFeatures(),\n   225→      this.featuresRepository.getTeamsFeatureStates({\n   226→        teamIds: teamIdsToQuery,\n   227→        featureIds: scopedFeatures.map((config) => config.slug),\n   228→      }),\n   229→    ]);\n   230→\n   231→    const results = scopedFeatures.map((config) => {\n   232→      const globalFeature = allFeatures.find((f) => f.slug === config.slug);\n   233→      const globalEnabled = globalFeature?.enabled ?? false;\n   234→      const teamState = teamStates[config.slug]?.[teamId] ?? \"inherit\";\n   235→      const orgState = getOrgStateForTeam(parentOrgId, teamStates, config.slug);\n   236→\n   237→      return { featureId: config.slug, globalEnabled, teamState, orgState };\n FeaturesRepository.setUserFeatureState.\n   246→   * Throws an error if the feature is not scoped to \"user\".\n   247→   */\n   248→  async setUserFeatureState(\n   249→    input:\n   250→      | { userId: number; featureId: FeatureId; state: \"enabled\" | \"disabled\"; assignedBy: number }\n   251→      | { userId: number; featureId: FeatureId; state: \"inherit\" }\n   252→  ): Promise<void> \"inherit\";\n  }\n  return \"inherit\";\n}\n\nfunction getOrgAutoOptIn(orgId: number | null, teamsAutoOptIn: Record<number, boolean>): boolean {\n  if (orgId !== null) {\n    return teamsAutoOptIn[orgId] ?? false;\n  }\n  return false;\n}\n\nfunction getTeamIdsToQuery(teamId: number, parentOrgId: number | null | undefined): number[] {\n  if (parentOrgId) {\n    return [teamId, parentOrgId];\n  }\n  return [teamId];\n}\n\nfunction getOrgStateForTeam(\n  parentOrgId: number | null | undefined,\n  teamStates: Record<string, Record<number, FeatureState>>,\n  slug: FeatureId\n): FeatureState {\n  if (parentOrgId) {\n    return teamStates[slug]?.[parentOrgId] ?? \"inherit\";\n  }\n  return \"inherit\";\n}\n\n/**\n * Service class for managing feature opt-in logic.\n * Computes effective states based on global, org, team, and user settings.\n */\nexport class FeatureOptInService implements IFeatureOptInService {\n  constructor(private featuresRepository: FeaturesRepository) {}\n\n  /**\n   * Core method: Resolve feature states for a user across all their teams.\n   *\n   * Precedence rules:\n   * 1. Global disabled → false (stop)\n   * 2. Org explicitly disabled → false (stop)\n   * 3. Org explicitly enabled → allowed at org level, continue to teams\n   * 4. Org inherits (or no org) → check teams\n   * 5. All teams explicitly disabled → false (stop)\n   * 6. At least one team enabled OR inherits → allowed at team level, continue to user\n   * 7. User explicitly disabled → false\n   * 8. User explicitly enabled OR inherits → true\n   *\n   * Auto-opt-in transformation:\n   * - If autoOptInFeatures=true at a level AND state is \"inherit\", transform to \"enabled\"\n   * - This transformation happens before computing effectiveEnabled\n   */\n  async resolveFeatureStatesAcrossTeams({\n    userId,\n    orgId,\n    teamIds,\n    featureIds,\n  }: {\n    userId: number;\n    orgId: number | null;\n    teamIds: number[];\n    featureIds: FeatureId[];\n  }): Promise<Record<string, ResolvedFeatureState>> {\n    const allTeamIds = orgId !== null ? [orgId, ...teamIds] : teamIds;\n\n    const [allFeatures, allTeamStates, userStates, userAutoOptIn, teamsAutoOptIn] = await Promise.all([\n      this.featuresRepository.getAllFeatures(),\n      this.featuresRepository.getTeamsFeatureStates({ teamIds: allTeamIds, featureIds }),\n      this.featuresRepository.getUserFeatureStates({ userId, featureIds }),\n      this.featuresRepository.getUserAutoOptIn(userId),\n      this.featuresRepository.getTeamsAutoOptIn(allTeamIds),\n    ]);\n\n    const globalEnabledMap = new Map(allFeatures.map((feature) => [feature.slug, feature.enabled ?? false]));\n    const resolvedStates: Record<string, ResolvedFeatureState> = {};\n\n    for (const featureId of featureIds) {\n      const state = this.resolveFeatureState(\n        featureId,\n        orgId,\n        teamIds,\n        globalEnabledMap,\n        allTeamStates,\n        userStates,\n        teamsAutoOptIn,\n        userAutoOptIn\n      );\n      resolvedStates[featureId] = state;\n    }\n\n    return resolvedStates;\n  }\n\n  private resolveFeatureState(\n    featureId: FeatureId,\n    orgId: number | null,\n    teamIds: number[],\n    globalEnabledMap: Map<string, boolean>,\n    allTeamStates: Record<string, Record<number, FeatureState>>,\n    userStates: Record<string, FeatureState>,\n    teamsAutoOptIn: Record<number, boolean>,\n    userAutoOptIn: boolean\n  ): ResolvedFeatureState {\n    const globalEnabled = globalEnabledMap.get(featureId) ?? false;\n    const teamStatesById = allTeamStates[featureId] ?? {};\n\n    const orgState = getOrgState(orgId, teamStatesById);\n    const teamStates = teamIds.map((teamId) => teamStatesById[teamId] ?? \"inherit\");\n    const userState = userStates[featureId] ?? \"inherit\";\n    const orgAutoOptIn = getOrgAutoOptIn(orgId, teamsAutoOptIn);\n    const teamAutoOptIns = teamIds.map((teamId) => teamsAutoOptIn[teamId] ?? false);\n\n    const { effectiveOrgState, effectiveTeamStates, effectiveUserState } = applyAutoOptIn({\n      orgState,\n      teamStates,\n      userState,\n      orgAutoOptIn,\n      teamAutoOptIns,\n      userAutoOptIn,\n    });\n\n    const policy: OptInFeaturePolicy = \"permissive\";\n\n    const { enabled: effectiveEnabled, reason: effectiveReason } = computeEffectiveStateAcrossTeams({\n      globalEnabled,\n      orgState: effectiveOrgState,\n      teamStates: effectiveTeamStates,\n      userState: effectiveUserState,\n      policy,\n    });\n\n    return {\n      featureId,\n      globalEnabled,\n      orgState,\n      teamStates,\n      userState,\n      effectiveEnabled,\n      effectiveReason,\n      orgAutoOptIn,\n      teamAutoOptIns,\n      userAutoOptIn,\n    };\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * List all opt-in features with their states for a user across teams.\n   * Only returns features that are in the allowlist, globally enabled, and scoped to \"user\".\n   */\n  async listFeaturesForUser(input: {\n    userId: number;\n    orgId: number | null;\n    teamIds: number[];\n  }): Promise<ListFeaturesForUserResult[]> {\n    const { userId, orgId, teamIds } = input;\n    const userScopedFeatures = getOptInFeaturesForScope(\"user\");\n    const featureIds = userScopedFeatures.map((config) => config.slug);\n\n    const resolvedStates = await this.resolveFeatureStatesAcrossTeams({\n      userId,\n      orgId,\n      teamIds,\n      featureIds,\n    });\n\n    return featureIds.map((featureId) => resolvedStates[featureId]).filter((state) => !state.globalEnabled);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * List all opt-in features with their raw states for a team or organization.\n   * Used for team/org admin settings page to configure feature opt-in.\n   * Only returns features that are in the allowlist, globally enabled, and scoped to the specified scope.\n   * If parentOrgId is provided, also returns the organization state for each feature.\n   */\n  async listFeaturesForTeam(input: {\n    teamId: number;\n    parentOrgId?: number | null;\n    scope?: OptInFeatureScope;\n  }): Promise<ListFeaturesForTeamResult[]> {\n    const { teamId, parentOrgId, scope = \"team\" } = input;\n    const teamIdsToQuery = getTeamIdsToQuery(teamId, parentOrgId);\n    const scopedFeatures = getOptInFeaturesForScope(scope);\n\n    const [allFeatures, teamStates] = await Promise.all([\n      this.featuresRepository.getAllFeatures(),\n      this.featuresRepository.getTeamsFeatureStates({\n        teamIds: teamIdsToQuery,\n        featureIds: scopedFeatures.map((config) => config.slug),\n      }),\n    ]);\n\n    const results = scopedFeatures.map((config) => {\n      const globalFeature = allFeatures.find((f) => f.slug === config.slug);\n      const globalEnabled = globalFeature?.enabled ?? false;\n      const teamState = teamStates[config.slug]?.[teamId] ?? \"inherit\";\n      const orgState = getOrgStateForTeam(parentOrgId, teamStates, config.slug);\n\n      return { featureId: config.slug, globalEnabled, teamState, orgState };\n    });\n\n    return results.filter((result) => result.globalEnabled);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Set user's feature state.\n   * Delegates to FeaturesRepository.setUserFeatureState.\n   * Throws an error if the feature is not scoped to \"user\".\n   */\n  async setUserFeatureState(\n    input:\n      | { userId: number; featureId: FeatureId; state: \"enabled\" | \"disabled\"; assignedBy: number }\n      | { userId: number; featureId: FeatureId; state: \"inherit\" }\n  ): Promise<void> {\n    const { userId, featureId, state } = input;\n\n    if (!isFeatureAllowedForScope(featureId, \"user\")) {\n      throw new ErrorWithCode(\n        ErrorCode.BadRequest,\n        `Feature \"${featureId}\" is not available at the user scope`\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (state === \"inherit\") {\n      await this.featuresRepository.setUserFeatureState({ userId, featureId, state });\n    } else {\n      const { assignedBy } = input;\n      await this.featuresRepository.setUserFeatureState({\n        userId,\n        featureId,\n        state,\n        assignedBy: `user-${assignedBy}`,\n      });\n    }\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Set team's feature state.\n   * Delegates to FeaturesRepository.setTeamFeatureState.\n   * Throws an error if the feature is not scoped to the specified scope.\n   */\n  async setTeamFeatureState(\n    input:\n      | { teamId: number; featureId: FeatureId; state: \"enabled\" | \"disabled\"; assignedBy: number; scope?: OptInFeatureScope }\n      | { teamId: number; featureId: FeatureId; state: \"inherit\"; scope?: OptInFeatureScope }\n  ): Promise<void> {\n    const { teamId, featureId, state } = input;\n    const scope = input.scope ?? \"team\";\n\n    if (!isFeatureAllowedForScope(featureId, scope)) {\n      throw new ErrorWithCode(\n        ErrorCode.BadRequest,\n        `Feature \"${featureId}\" is not available at the ${scope} scope`\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (state === \"inherit\") {\n      await this.featuresRepository.setTeamFeatureState({ teamId, featureId, state });\n    } else {\n      const { assignedBy } = input;\n      await this.featuresRepository.setTeamFeatureState({\n        teamId,\n        featureId,\n        state,\n        assignedBy: `user-${assignedBy}`,\n      });\n    }\n  }\n}\n","numLines":308,"startLine":1,"totalLines":308}}}

features with states for a team settings page.\n   * Used by team admins to configure feature opt-in for their team.\n   * Also returns the organization state if the team belongs to an organization.\n teamRepository.findParentOrganizationByTeamId(input.teamId);\n    const parentOrgId = parentOrg?.id ?? null;\n\n    return featureOptInService.listFeaturesForTeam({ teamId: input.teamId, parentOrgId, scope: \"team\" });\n  }),\n\n  /**\n   * Get all opt-in features with states for organization settings page.\n   * Used by org admins to configure feature opt-in for their organization.\n   */\n  listForOrganization: createOrgPbacProcedure(\"featureOptIn.read\").query(async ({ ctx }) => {\n    // Organizations use the same listFeaturesForTeam since they're stored in TeamFeatures\n    // Pass scope: \"org\" to filter features that are scoped to organizations\n    return featureOptInService.listFeaturesForTeam({ teamId: ctx.organizationId, scope: \"org\" });\n  }),\n\n  /**\n   * Set user's feature state.\n   */\n  setUserState: authedProcedure\n    .input(\n      z.object({\n        slug: z.string(),\n        state: featureStateSchema,\n      })\n    )\n    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {\n      await featureOptInService.setUserFeatureState({\n        userId: ctx.user.id,\n        featureId: input.slug,\n        state: input.state,\n        assignedBy: ctx.user.id,\n      });\n\n      return { success: true };\n    }),\n\n  /**\n   * Set team's feature state (requires team admin).\n   */\n  setTeamState: createTeamPbacProcedure(\"featureOptIn.update\")\n    .input(\n      z.object({\n        slug: z.string(),\n        state: featureStateSchema,\n      })\n    )\n    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {\n      if (!isOptInFeature(input.slug)) {\n        throw new TRPCError({\n          code: \"BAD_REQUEST\",\n          message: \"Invalid slug. This feature is not opt-in configurable.\",\n        });\n      }\n\n      await featureOptInService.setTeamFeatureState({\n        teamId: input.teamId,\n        featureId: input.slug,\n        state: input.state,\n        assignedBy: ctx.user.id,\n        scope: \"team\",\n      });\n\n      return { success: true };\n    }),\n\n  /**\n   * Set organization's feature state (requires org admin).\n   */\n  setOrganizationState: createOrgPbacProcedure(\"featureOptIn.update\")\n    .input(\n      z.object({\n        slug: z.string(),\n        state: featureStateSchema,\n      })\n    )\n    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {\n      if (!isOptInFeature(input.slug)) {\n        throw new TRPCError({\n          code: \"BAD_REQUEST\",\n          message: \"Invalid slug. This feature is not opt-in configurable.\",\n        });\n      }\n\n      // Organizations use the same TeamFeatures table\n      await featureOptInService.setTeamFeatureState({\n        teamId: ctx.organizationId,\n        featureId: input.slug,\n        state: input.state,\n        assignedBy: ctx.user.id,\n        scope: \"org\",\n      });\n\n      return { success: true };\n    }),\n\n  /**\n   * Get user's auto opt-in preference.\n   */\n  getUserAutoOptIn: authedProcedure.query(async ({ ctx }) => {\n    const autoOptIn = await featuresRepository.getUserAutoOptIn(ctx.user.id);\n    return { autoOptIn };\n  }),\n\n  /**\n   * Set user's auto opt-in preference.\n   */\n  setUserAutoOptIn: authedProcedure\n    .input(\n      z.object({\n        autoOptIn: z.boolean(),\n      })\n    )\n    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {\n      await featuresRepository.setUserAutoOptIn(ctx.user.id, input.autoOptIn);\n      return { success: true };\n    }),\n\n  /**\n   * Get team's auto opt-in preference (requires team admin).\n   */\n  getTeamAutoOptIn: createTeamPbacProcedure(\"featureOptIn.read\").query(async ({ input }) => {\n    const result = await featuresRepository.getTeamsAutoOptIn([input.teamId]);\n    return { autoOptIn: result[input.teamId] ?? false };\n  }),\n\n  /**\n   * Set team's auto opt-in preference (requires team admin).\n   */\n  setTeamAutoOptIn: createTeamPbacProcedure(\"featureOptIn.update\")\n    .input(\n      z.object({\n        autoOptIn: z.boolean(),\n      })\n    )\n    .mutation(async ({ input }) => {\n      await featuresRepository.setTeamAutoOptIn(input.teamId, input.autoOptIn);\n      return { success: true };\n    }),\n\n  /**\n   * Get organization's auto opt-in preference (requires org admin).\n   */\n  getOrganizationAutoOptIn: createOrgPbacProcedure(\"featureOptIn.read\").query(async ({ ctx }) => {\n    const result = await featuresRepository.getTeamsAutoOptIn([ctx.organizationId]);\n    return { autoOptIn: result[ctx.organizationId] ??
